description: Modern, efficient Docker management application providing real-time container management, Compose stack orchestration, and multi-environment support. Features include interactive terminal access, file browser, Git integration, and SSO via OIDC. All in a lightweight, secure and privacy-focused package.
tagline: Modern Docker management you will like
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
**Support BigBearTechWorld**: https://ko-fi.com/bigbeartechworld
**Community Forum**: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com

Dockhand provides modern Docker management with real-time container orchestration, Compose stack management, and multi-environment support. Authentication is disabled by default for easy setup - consider enabling it in Settings > Authentication after installation.

**Security Note**: This app requires Docker socket access, which grants full Docker daemon privileges.

title: Dockhand
